data.title: Albertsons appoints executive to lead retail media network
data.description: The new senior vice president of the Albertsons Media Collective joins the company with prior experience from Dentsu, Pinterest and Walmart.

data.title: Report: AI becomes strategic engine of B2B revenue generation
data.description: 91% of respondents say they plan to increase AI spending over the next 12 months. And all of them are now using generative AI tools to support sales, marketing, or customer success.

data.title: SAP sees strong demand for cloud, AI, and data tools
data.description: The company is investing heavily in AI-powered “agents” that help customers automate common business tasks.

data.title: Clorox sues Cognizant over cyberattack
data.description: Clorox claims that despite assurances from Cognizant, its staff repeatedly failed to authenticate users properly.

data.title: Q&A: How Hibbett is approaching its new ecommerce site and omnichannel strategy
data.description: Hibbett's vice president of digital operations discussed the retailer's ecommerce priorities, as well as its omnichannel strengths.
